Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 606}I love wearing a yukata. It makes me feel so classy and traditional![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 606}I bought a lot of Kyoto sweets when we were allowed to walk around on our own![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 606}I want to try them, but if I eat them all now, I'll get chunky... What should I do!?[n]{f 1 1}
